project_privacy_data_flows.description: CLLocationManager with allowsBackgroundLocationUpdates monitors significant location changes and zone regions. Location sent to HA server as device tracker.

flow_steps.details: CLLocationManager configured for background location with significant location change monitoring.
Significant location change monitoring active in background.

flow_steps.code: private func processNextEvent() { guard currentEvent == nil, let (event, resolver) = queue.pop() else { return } }
flow_steps.details: Location events processed sequentially from queue. Events include region enter/exit and raw location changes.

flow_steps.code: func perform(event:) -> Promise<Void> { let promise = queue.add(event: event); processNextEvent(); return promise }
flow_steps.details: Accuracy fuzzers (MultiZone, RegionEnter, MultiRegionOverlap) applied to protect location precision.

flow_steps.code: api.SubmitLocation(updateType: trigger, location: location, zone: event.associatedZone)
flow_steps.details: Location submitted to all available HA servers via SubmitLocation webhook.
Zone enter/exit events fired as HA events.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: GPS coordinates reverse-geocoded via CLGeocoder into street addresses. Data sent to Apple servers for geocoding.

flow_steps.code: public func sensors() -> Promise<[WebhookSensor]> { firstly { Current.geocoder.geocode(location) } }
flow_steps.details: Sensor update triggers reverse geocoding of current GPS location.
GPS coordinates sent to Apple CLGeocoder service, which may resolve to street-level address.

flow_steps.code: var attributes = Self.attributes(for: placemarks); attributes["Zones"] = Array(insideZones)
flow_steps.details: Address attributes extracted from CLPlacemark including administrative area, locality, thoroughfare, and time zone.
Geocoded location sensor submitted to HA server via standard sensor webhook.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: One-shot location queries triggered by various events (push notification, background fetch, URL scheme) via CLLocationManager requestLocation.

flow_steps.details: Multiple trigger types can request a one-shot location: Manual, PushNotification, BackgroundFetch, URLScheme, XCallbackURL, Siri, AppShortcut, Visit, Periodic.
GPS fix acquired via CLLocationManager with timeout based on trigger type (10-30 seconds).
One-shot location submitted to HA server.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: CLBeaconRegion monitoring for user-defined iBeacons. Region enter/exit events trigger location updates.

flow_steps.details: CLBeaconRegion regions monitored for enter/exit events alongside CLCircularRegions.

flow_steps.code: private static func evaluateRegionEvent(region:, state:, zone:) -> Promise<Void>
flow_steps.details: Beacon exit events are ignored (beaconExitIgnored) to prevent false exits. Zone enter events trigger location submission.
